title: acanthophaca leiosemia
side_effects: Acanthophaca leiosemia can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as a result of excessive consumption. In some cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, leading to symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use can lead to kidney and liver damage due to the plant's toxic compounds. Additionally, misuse of Acanthophaca leiosemia may also interact with other medications, resulting in adverse health effects.
